This no longer drops in the Mines of Nurga.  Have been AA'ing there with my BST for over 2 months and never seen it. There is only 3 Burynai that spawn here now. 2 are slaves and have been freed on mos server and the other is Traitor Efuin, rare spawn.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 07 2001 at 2:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Im selling one on Drinal for around 300pp, if you want it send me a tell
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 26 2001 at 10:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL has anyone seen the new price??? some idiot decided that 500pp just wasn't enough! LOL
why ( for me anyway *s*)
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 10:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764377426
1 post
The reason that I'd see for a cleric to have this as opposed to banded, has to do with weight. As a DE cleric who pumped all points into WIS, I'll gladly give up one pt of AC for a reduction of 7 in weight. The other stats on the robe are just bonus.
▲ Page top
...why?!?
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 3:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757520881
31 posts
I dont see much point in this thing, +25 mana and +15 hp is hardly a big deal, the +2 dex cant hurt, but doesn't do a cleric much good(if your a good cleric that is) and it has less ac than banded...i just dont get it
▲ Page top
RE: ...why?!?
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 11:31 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Why is 25 mana no big deal for a cleric? According to your info page, your cleric is level 20. At level 20, 25 mana is more than you would get from 6 wisdom (24 mana). It's also more than enough wisdom to cast divine aura, which will save your behind more often than the 2 ac addition you get from banded. True, if you are higher level, you will prefer a +wis item, unless you have reached the wis cap, which is now 255, with the luclin patches. BTW, post 200 wis, the mana calculation is lvl/10, instead of lvl/5, so you may still prefer this, unless the other item has a lot of wisdom.

Personally, I would take 25 mana, 15hp and 2 dex over 2 more ac any time, but then I manage aggro fairly well, so I don't get hit often.
▲ Page top
RE: ...why?!?
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 8:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761090559
Scholar
22 posts
The point of this thing is mostly weight. It weighs less than a pound and since clerics are always wearing a full suit of armor they are always weighed down. It felt good to drop 12 pounds when I got rid of my bronze BP and got this ) Didn't mind losing 3 ac because the 15hp pretty much equals it out
Plus this is one of the only cleric robes I've ever seen, and I think it looks cool. I was saving up 500pp for it but I got lucky and bought mine for 75pp )
▲ Page top
2 in 3 hours
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2001 at 1:11 AM Rating: Decent
jnovah
Scholar
57 posts
Not too uncommon in Nurga. Matter of fact 2 of the 4 members of the party had it in the bank making the remaining 2 very happy. Good addition to a future character.)

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 3:35 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi i am a Cleric on the bristlebane server, and I would like to buy this. If u want to sell plz give tell in game.
Damn Lucky
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:23 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This Gi was given to me, when I was a level 4 Cleric, a guy just walked up and just gave it to me. I still use it, and I am now level 18. At the time, I didn't know how good of an item this was, it was the first time I played Eq (a true newbie), I can tell you that this is still the best piece in my inventory, and it looks exceptionally good. This thing is the best item that I've had!!

Thank you,
Aarrin of Dii Minores
Quellios Server
